category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates a TOC for GitHub README.md files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is github-markdown-toc; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project github-markdown-toc.go.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GitHub README table-of-contents creation; source_facts.executables shows the gh-md-toc CLI.
